hero.lead: Four private cottages nestled in the hills above Grecia—each one a quiet place to rest, breathe, and reconnect with nature.
hero.imageAlt: Mango Valley pool and gardens overlooking the valley near Grecia, Costa Rica

mariposa.imageAlt: Mariposa Cottage twin beds at Mango Valley
mariposa.title: Mariposa Cottage
mariposa.description: Elegant and spacious, this cottage has two twin beds and en-suite bathroom with shower.

colibri.imageAlt: Colibri Cottage queen bed at Mango Valley
colibri.title: Colibri Cottage
colibri.description: This cottage has a hand-made queen size bed with an orthopedic mattress, a roomy closet and en-suite bathroom with shower.

poas.imageAlt: Poas Cottage bedroom at Mango Valley
poas.title: Poas Cottage
poas.description: Two rooms and a terrace overlooking hummingbird-filled greenery. Queen bed with orthopedic mattress, dining table, en-suite shower, and rocking chairs with sweeping Poás views.

morpho.description: Our most popular cottage—queen bed with orthopedic mattress, SKY TV, in-room WiFi, en-suite jacuzzi and shower, and a terrace with volcano and coffee plantation views.

highlights.title: En-suite jacuzzi
highlights.description: Private jacuzzi and shower for a restorative soak after a day in the hills.

highlights.title: Volcano views
highlights.description: Terrace overlooking Poás and the surrounding coffee plantations.

morpho.imageAlt: Morpho Cottage bed and jacuzzi suite at Mango Valley

newsletter.title: The Forest Letter
newsletter.description: Receive seasonal updates, botanical wisdom, and exclusive retreat offerings directly in your inbox.
